task_completion.description: Create the libs.versions.toml file in the gradle directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'libs.versions.toml' is visible in the project explorer under the 'gradle' directory, or is open as a tab in the editor.

task_completion.description: Define the correct library versions in the TOML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '[versions]' block in 'libs.versions.toml' contains the correct version numbers (e.g., 1.12.0, 2.9.0, 2.6.1, 1.7.3, 1.11.0).

task_completion.description: Define the library aliases in the TOML file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '[libraries]' block in 'libs.versions.toml' maps aliases to the correct group and name, referencing the versions defined above (e.g., group = 'androidx.core', name = 'core-ktx').
The 'dependencies' block in 'app/build.gradle.kts' uses catalog references (e.g., 'libs.androidx.core.ktx') instead of hardcoded strings for the specified libraries.
The 'dependencies' block in 'data/build.gradle.kts' uses catalog references (e.g., 'libs.retrofit') instead of hardcoded strings.
Android Studio shows a 'Gradle sync finished' or 'Build successful' message with a green checkmark, and there are no unresolved reference errors (red text) on the 'libs' object in the editor.

integrity.description: Agent used an IDE or text editor to modify the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Android Studio or another text editor open with the project files, rather than just terminal commands like 'sed' or 'echo' being used blindly.

integrity.description: Agent actually synced or built the project to verify correctness
integrity.visual_evidence: The Build or Sync tool window in Android Studio is visible and shows output corresponding to the 'WeatherTracker' project.

integrity.description: Agent did not leave hardcoded versions alongside the new catalog references
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'dependencies' blocks in the .kts files do not contain the old hardcoded version strings (e.g., '1.12.0', '2.9.0') mixed with or commented out next to the new catalog references.
